title: The Gym
overview: Bernard goes to the gym and starts training enthusiastically

title: Golf
overview: Bernard experiences the powerful attraction of the golf course

title: Ice Climbing
overview: Bernard sets off to climb the highest peak but it's tricker the closer he gets to the top

title: The Swing
overview: Bernard finds a beautiful tree with a swing. But someone else has got there first

title: Security Guard
overview: Bernard is very familiar with the exhibits in the museum where he works

title: The Vending Machine
overview: Sportsmanship is about knowing how to win and how to lose

title: Diving Board
overview: Bernard desperately tries to copy all the things that Lloyd the penguin enjoys doing

title: Watching TV
overview: Whatever the time, wherever he is, Bernard is completely hooked on television

title: Hitchhiking
overview: Picking up hitchhikers can often be very dangerous. So when Bernard stops to pick up Zack, he should remember that one day he may need a lift

title: Sky Diving
overview: If Bernard ever jumps out of the plane, he's bound to forget his parachute

title: At the Theme Park
overview: Bernard just wants to have a good time at the theme park

title: A Day in the Country
overview: It looks like rain, but Bernard's not worried because he's got his umbrella

title: Learning to Fly
overview: Bernard is learning to fly, and may not have chosen the best day

title: Close Encounters
overview: Bernard wants to watch a movie, but an UFO forces him to change his plans

title: The Intruder
overview: One night Bernard’s supper is interrupted by an intruder. Can a lone polar bear deal with the darkness, his own deep-seated fears and …. a little mouse?

title: Basketball
overview: Animated adventures. There's nothing Bernard likes better than a challenge

title: The Cart
overview: What do you get when you cross a motor scooter with a supermarket cart? The answer - as Bernard finds out the hard way – is a highly dangerous vehicle

title: The Supermarket
overview: Bernard is delighted with the bargains he has bought. The problem is how to get them home

title: The Mosquito
overview: Bernard feels very tired and wants to sleep for hours, but there's a mosquito about

title: Oasis
overview: In the middle of the desert Bernard stumbles across an oasis. The palm trees look real

title: The Treasure
overview: A map may lead to hidden treasure, but does not always mention the hidden dangers

title: The Window Cleaner
overview: Bernard is cleaning the windows of a skyscraper when he disturbs two birds

title: Street Racing
overview: When Zack lines up alongside him at the traffic lights, it gives Bernard the perfect excuse to start a race through the city streets. But what about other road users?

title: The Desert Island
overview: Bernard finds himself on a desert island and alienates the locals

title: Baseball
overview: Bernard runs into trouble with the baseball pitching machine

title: The Car
overview: Bernard is proud of his small convertible. The only trouble is that he can’t get everything in the boot, which complicates life more than you would imagine

title: The Flower
overview: Bernard loves his flower, and is determined to do whatever is necessary to protect it from danger – no matter what the cost

title: Sleepwalker
overview: Bernard discovers that he has been sleepwalking

title: The Unicycle
overview: To the amazement of Zack, Bernard discovers he has some performing skills which he never knew he had

title: The Motorboat
overview: Bernard has been shipwrecked, but his real problems begin when he finds a motorboat

title: The Prisoner
overview: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison

title: Bowling
overview: Bowling Bernard the bowling champ takes on a clumsy challenger

title: Taekwondo
overview: Animated adventures. Bernard decides to learn Taekwondo

title: Scuba Diving
overview: Bernard looks forward to a day's scuba diving

title: Doors
overview: Most people can negotiate revolving doors, but Bernard is not quite like everyone else

title: At the Museum
overview: Bernard pays a visit to a museum

title: A Lucky Day
overview: Is it possible for an accident prone polar bear to have a lucky day?

title: The Storm
overview: Bernard has a polar home on the ice cap, but is forced to leave after a storm

title: The Robot
overview: A robot seems to offer Bernard a simple solution to the problem of cleaning his house

title: The Vacuum Cleaner
overview: When the vacuum cleaner finishes its work, there's no sign of Bernard's lottery ticket

title: The Package
overview: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying, and at first he succeeds

title: Marathon
overview: Children's animation. Bernard, Zack and Lloyd are competing in a marathon

title: The Fumigator
overview: Do you like cockroaches? No? Well, nor does Bernard, and he is determined to get them out of his house somehow

title: The Fumigator 2
overview: Despite all Bernard's efforts, the cockroaches are taking over Bernard’s house, but his patience is running out

title: Close Encounters 2
overview: Animated adventures. A UFO appears on Bernard's radar

title: The Little Dog
overview: Animation. Goliath may be tiny but he packs an oversize charge of aggression

title: The Medallion
overview: Animated adventures of Bernard the Polar Bear. Bernard finds a medallion

title: The Moth
overview: Bernard's kitchen is invaded by a moth

title: Bullfighter
overview: Despite his lack of experience Bernard decides to try some bull fighting

title: At the North Pole
overview: Miles of arctic wasteland are boring Bernard

title: A Day in the Country 2
overview: Animated adventures of Bernard the polar bear. Bernard wants to enjoy nature
